## Purpose

## Process
### Functions
- `_conn()`: (no docstring)
- `_agent_brutal_feedback()`: Missing-task list · what's still scaffold / unwired.
- `_agent_top1pct_status()`: Top-1% scorecard rollup.
- `_agent_pending_tasks()`: PENDING_TASKS_PLAN.md counts (live read).
- `_agent_error_status()`: Errors by category · per operator: api/data/frontend/backend/model/accuracy/integration.
- `_agent_testing_status()`: Number of tests completed.
- `_agent_scalability_status()`: Scalability · capacity util + queue depth.
- `_agent_load_perf_status()`: Load + perf · p50/p95 over last 1h · excludes cron-watchdog.
- `health()`: (no docstring)
- `all_status()`: Run all 7 status agents · return their live state.
- `by_id(agent_id)`: Run a single status agent.

- Return values from functions above
